metadata.title: Paramotor Chiang Mai | Tandem Flights with Dream Sky
metadata.description: Tandem paramotor flights over Chiang Mai with licensed pilots. See Doi Suthep, rice fields, and sea of mist from a 360° view. No experience needed — book on LINE.
metadata.packages_description: Paramotor Chiang Mai packages — 15–20 min tandem trial flights, certified pilot courses, and surprise gift flights. Pro pilots, safe gear, GoPro 4K add-on.
metadata.blog_description: Paramotor Chiang Mai guides — best seasons to fly, first-timer tips, and real stories from our pilots. Plan your tandem flight with Dream Sky.

notFound.title: This page has drifted out of the sky

footer.description: Paramotor flights over Chiang Mai — feel the mountains from above.

hero.subtitle: Paramotor tours in Chiang Mai — mountains, rice fields and mist from a 360° view above.
hero.note: No experience needed — anyone can fly!

why.title: Why paramotor in Chiang Mai?
why.subtitle: Every altitude opens a view the ground can't offer.

items.title: Layered Mountains
items.description: Doi Suthep, Doi Luang and the full Chiang Mai range in one frame.

items.title: Green Rice Fields
items.description: Patterns of Chiang Mai's paddies only visible from above.

items.title: Sunrise & Sunset
items.description: Gold light piercing the clouds — impossibly romantic.

items.title: Seasonal Sea of Mist
items.description: Float above a sea of clouds — nowhere else feels like this.

items.title: 360° Open View
items.description: No walls, no glass — just you and the sky.

experience.title: What It Feels Like Up There
items: Absolute freedom — like floating on the sky itself.
Doi Suthep and the mountains ringing the city.
Thrill and calm, in the exact same breath.
